description: What are the conditions and criteria for receiving mobility assistance from Pôle emploi when seeking employment abroad or for job interviews outside the local area?
narrative: The user is a registered jobseeker in France who is considering relocating temporarily for a job interview or to start a new position, possibly in a different country or more than 60 km from their residence. They need to understand whether they qualify for mobility assistance, including travel, accommodation, and meal reimbursements, and what documentation or procedural steps are required. Relevance is determined by whether the document outlines eligibility conditions (e.g., distance thresholds, employment type, registration status), types of supported expenses, application procedures, and specific services like the SAM network or SNCF vouchers. Documents that discuss unrelated benefits such as car purchase loans, training stipends, or professional immersion are not relevant.

title: SFR Client Area Access
description: How can a customer access their SFR Client Area to view bills, manage accounts, and track usage without a username or password?
narrative: The user is a current SFR customer who has forgotten their login credentials (username and password) and needs to regain access to their SFR Client Area to view invoices, monitor mobile and fixed-line usage, and manage account settings. The user may have previously registered an email or have access to a recent invoice. Relevance is determined by documents that provide step-by-step guidance on recovering access through email verification, SMS-based authentication, invoice number lookup, or alternative login methods, including the use of the SFR & Me app or LICO Client Area. Documents discussing unrelated topics such as SFR Mail, PUK code recovery, or business customer spaces are not relevant to this specific information need.

title: Oil Lamp Accessories
description: What are the key components and quality considerations for selecting replacement parts such as glass, spouts, and wicks for oil lamps?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information about the essential components of oil lamps—specifically glass, spouts, and wicks—focusing on quality, compatibility, and functionality for both vintage and modern outdoor or indoor use. They are interested in understanding how to choose durable, safe, and aesthetically appropriate parts, especially those that support long-term use and enhance ambiance. Relevance is determined by documents that discuss specific materials (e.g., glass, brass, copper), brand options (e.g., Gaudart, Cao Camping), installation tips, and safety considerations related to these components. Documents that focus solely on safety tips, general history, or unrelated products (e.g., petrole lamp glass without context) are less relevant unless they directly address component selection and quality.

title: Car Rental in Madeira
description: What are the best options for renting a car in Madeira with inclusive insurance, transparent pricing, and flexible pickup/drop-off locations?
narrative: A traveler planning a visit to Madeira seeks a reliable and cost-effective car rental service that offers comprehensive insurance (including no deductible), transparent pricing without hidden fees, and the flexibility to pick up and drop off the vehicle at various locations across the island, including Funchal, the airport, and other towns. The user values a trustworthy booking platform, immediate confirmation, and a vehicle in good condition, ideally with free delivery and the ability to book online without requiring an upfront deposit. The user is particularly interested in services that emphasize customer trust, such as those offering payment only upon vehicle collection, and is looking to avoid last-minute surprises or additional costs at the rental counter. The ideal solution should also provide support for long-term rentals and special requests, such as diesel vehicles or child seats, while ensuring a seamless experience from booking to return.

title: Baked Potatoes
description: What is the optimal cooking time and method for achieving perfectly crispy exterior and tender interior in oven-baked potatoes, considering variations in potato size and oven power?
narrative: A home cook is seeking a reliable, well-tested method for baking potatoes to achieve a consistently delicious result—crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside. They have encountered conflicting advice in online recipes, particularly regarding cooking time (e.g., 20 minutes vs. up to an hour), and are concerned about undercooking or burning. The user wants to understand the factors affecting baking time (such as potato size, oven temperature, and preparation method) and how to verify doneness. They also value practical tips, such as seasoning techniques and alternative ingredients (e.g., garlic, herbs), but prioritize accuracy in core cooking parameters. Relevant documents provide a recipe with a specific method and cooking time, along with user feedback that questions the time estimate and offers real-world testing experiences, making these crucial for forming a nuanced answer.

title: Back-to-Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the conditions and procedures for qualifying for the back-to-work bonus in France, particularly for individuals transitioning from RSA or SSA to salaried employment?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed, accurate information about the back-to-work bonus in France, specifically targeting individuals who have recently returned to work after receiving RSA (Revenu de Solidarité Active) or SSA (Allocation Spécifique de Solidarité). The user's intent is to understand whether they qualify based on employment duration, contract type (CDI/CDD), monthly working hours (minimum 78 hours), and the necessity of prior receipt of RSA or SSA. They also want to know the application process, required documentation (e.g., employment contract, payslips), and the timing of payment (typically the 4th month after re-employment or in advance under certain conditions). The user may be a job seeker or beneficiary of social benefits who is preparing to enter the workforce and needs to confirm eligibility and procedural steps to claim the €1,000 bonus. Relevance is determined by documents confirming the bonus's existence, eligibility criteria, application process, and payment conditions for RSA/SSA recipients returning to work, while excluding documents about unrelated benefits (e.g., Christmas bonus), unrelated employment schemes (e.g., CSP), or non-relevant products (e.g., oil stove fuel).
